ai_summary.one_liner: First autonomous research framework specialized for clinical medicine with clinician-engineer co-reasoning for evidence-grounded ideation and MICCAI-level manuscript generation
ai_summary.problem: Existing AI Scientists are domain-agnostic and cannot handle clinical medicine's requirements for medical evidence, specialized data modalities, and ethical policies
ai_summary.solution: Multi-agent framework with clinician-engineer co-reasoning, 3 progressive research modes (reproduction/innovation/exploration), medical toolbox (MONAI), and evidence-grounded manuscript composer
ai_summary.key_result: Outperforms Gemini 2.5 Pro and GPT-5 in idea quality across 171 cases/19 tasks; generated papers approach MICCAI level in double-blind evaluation
limitations: No genomics or drug discovery evaluation
Automated evaluation vs actual peer review gap

figures.caption: Figure 1: a, System workflow: fully-automated multi-agents system for end-to-end scientific discovery in clinical medicine. b, Med-AI Bench: visualization depicting 19 distinct medical research tasks within performance benchmarking. c, Experimental setup: comparative evaluation across Idea generation, execution and full paper compilation in the research lifecycle. d, Performance benchmarking: comparison against top-tier medical AI conferences.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 1: a, 시스템 워크플로: 임상 의학 종단간 과학 발견을 위한 완전 자동 다중 에이전트 시스템. b, Med-AI Bench: 성능 벤치마킹 내 19개 의학 연구 태스크 시각화. c, 실험 설정: 연구 라이프사이클 전반의 아이디어 생성, 실행, 논문 작성 비교 평가. d, 성능 벤치마킹: 최상위 의학 AI 학회와의 비교.

figures.caption: Figure 2: Medical AI Scientist surpasses commercial LLMs in idea generation under combined LLM-based and blinded human evaluation. Models generated research ideas that were anonymized and assessed by three independent experts using a five point scale. a, LLM based evaluation of idea quality. b, Quantitative human assessment across six evaluation criteria. c, Qualitative human analysis of strengths and weaknesses.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 2: Medical AI Scientist가 LLM 기반 및 블라인드 인간 평가 모두에서 상용 LLM의 아이디어 생성을 상회한다. 모델이 생성한 연구 아이디어를 익명화하고 3명의 독립 전문가가 5점 척도로 평가. a, LLM 기반 아이디어 품질 평가. b, 6개 평가 기준에 따른 정량적 인간 평가. c, 강점과 약점의 정성적 인간 분석.

figures.caption: Figure 3: Example of idea generation comparison between Medical AI Scientist and commercial LLMs in the Literature-inspired Innovation Mode.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 3: Literature-inspired Innovation 모드에서 Medical AI Scientist와 상용 LLM 간 아이디어 생성 비교 예시.

figures.caption: Figure 4: Comparative evaluation of Medical AI Scientist frameworks against commercial LLMs in terms of implementation completeness and experimental success rate. a, Implementation completeness was assessed on a five point scale ranging from 1 to 5. b, Experimental success rate measured through quantitative verification of full experimental pipelines.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 4: 구현 완성도와 실험 성공률 측면에서 Medical AI Scientist와 상용 LLM의 비교 평가. a, 구현 완성도(1-5점). b, 전체 실험 파이프라인의 정량적 검증을 통한 실험 성공률.

figures.caption: Figure 5: Anonymized comparison of paper quality on an identical medical task. Manuscripts generated by Medical AI Scientist achieve performance comparable to MICCAI, ISBI, and BIBM under consistent double-blind evaluation across both quantitative and qualitative assessments: a, Stanford Agentic Reviewer automatic evaluation. b, Double-blinded scoring (1–5) by 10 medical experts (PhD/postdoc) across five criteria. c, Qualitative evaluation summary.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 5: 동일 의학 태스크에서의 익명 논문 품질 비교. Medical AI Scientist 생성 논문이 MICCAI, ISBI, BIBM과 정량적·정성적 이중 블라인드 평가에서 MICCAI에 근접한 성능을 달성. a, Stanford Agentic Reviewer 자동 평가. b, 10명의 의학 전문가(PhD/postdoc)에 의한 이중 블라인드 점수(1-5점). c, 정성적 평가 요약.

figures.caption: Figure 6: The conceptual illustration of the Medical AI Scientist: A comprehensive system of fully-automated agents for end-to-end scientific discovery in clinical medicine. The system offers three user interaction modes: Reproduction (reproducing a specified hypothesis), Innovation (innovating from provided literature) and Exploration (autonomously exploring a given research direction), to streamline the research process from idea generation to execution and manuscript writing.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 6: Medical AI Scientist 개념 도해: 임상 의학 종단간 과학 발견을 위한 완전 자동 에이전트 시스템. Reproduction(가설 재현), Innovation(문헌 기반 혁신), Exploration(연구 방향 자율 탐색) 세 가지 모드로 아이디어 생성부터 실행, 논문 작성까지의 연구 과정을 자동화한다.

figures.caption: Figure A.1: Example of Medical AI Scientist Innovation Mode on the medical image classification task. All necessary processes and outcomes are presented, with human expert's notes in bottom boxes.
figures.caption_ko: Figure A.1: 의학 영상 분류 태스크에서 Medical AI Scientist Innovation 모드 예시. 모든 과정과 결과가 제시되며, 하단 박스에 인간 전문가 노트가 포함된다.

figures.caption: Figure A.2: Example of Medical AI Scientist Exploration Mode on the medical video restoration task. All necessary processes and outcomes are presented, with human expert's notes in bottom boxes.
figures.caption_ko: Figure A.2: 의학 영상 복원 태스크에서 Medical AI Scientist Exploration 모드 예시. 모든 과정과 결과가 제시되며, 하단 박스에 인간 전문가 노트가 포함된다.
